title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Big Mom, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Law, Unknown person #4 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have decided to from an alliance with Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We all want to see you become the pirate King! Perorin

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So you guys trust me, don't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well... I'm glad to hear that

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perospero, I agreed to your offer because we had the same goal...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey Marco! Why is a man like you helping those kids!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that how the "remants" of the Whitebeard Pirates have ended up

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems like you don't know what "remants" means...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are not tied down by the word of pops

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: those of us that have remained, are free to do as they want

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see... Dead men tell no tales, huh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Things are quite noisy out there

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think they will reach us here?

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: good thing we hid in this room

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Play something for us big Sis Maria

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But longing is all we have!! For what can two people do alone

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 42 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
